goldenUpdatePolicy.oraclePolicy: Kanvas-owned fixtures and reviewed dumps define pass/fail; external comparisons are drift-only.

dumpRows.updatePolicy: Producer dump changes require focused test diffs and matrix checkpoint updates before any golden promotion.
A8 mask golden changes require reviewed CPU coverage/hash diffs, refusal-diagnostic review, and explicit non-claim review without atlas, SDF, LCD, or GPU promotion.
A8/SDF lifecycle golden changes require fixture provenance, stable diagnostics, and matrix checkpoint updates without GPU upload or complete atlas lifecycle promotion.
Arabic seed golden changes require diagnostic review and matrix checkpoint updates without Arabic or complex shaping support promotion.
Bidi runs golden changes require fixture text diff review, stable control/diagnostic review, and explicit non-claims without paragraph layout, shaping, or GPU text promotion.
CFF/CFF2 readiness golden changes require fixture provenance, explicit refusal coverage, and matrix checkpoint updates without Type 2 or CFF2 support promotion.
CFF Type 2 trace golden changes require deterministic generated-fixture traces, stable refusal diagnostics, and explicit non-claims without promoting real-font CFF support.
CFF INDEX/DICT golden changes require generated fixture provenance, stable parse diagnostics, explicit non-claims, and no host-font oracle expansion.

CFF subroutine trace golden changes require deterministic nested/local/global traces, fixed execution-limit serialization, stable refusal diagnostics, and explicit non-claims without promoting real-font CFF support.
Format coverage changes require parser tests and explicit remaining-gate wording.

Color glyph plan bundle changes require reviewed COLRv0/COLRv1 case diffs, gradient geometry/variable-stop/refusal review, bounds/artifact-key verification, and explicit non-claims without COLRv1 transform/composite/clip, bitmap, SVG, emoji, GPU, or platform fallback support promotion.
Color/SVG/emoji golden changes require fixture provenance, refusal review, and matrix checkpoint updates without COLRv1, PNG, SVG, emoji, GPU, or platform fallback support promotion.

COLRv1 paint-graph bundle changes require reviewed node-order, bounds propagation, palette-resolution, gradient geometry/variable-stop/refusal diffs, and explicit non-claims without COLRv1 transform/composite/clip, bitmap, SVG, emoji, GPU, or platform fallback support.
Catalog dump changes require deterministic order tests and no host-path leakage.
Fallback trace golden changes require candidate-order, script/locale/emoji reason, refusal diagnostic, and matrix checkpoint review without fallback support promotion.
Feature policy matrix changes require script-row review, default-feature review, and non-claim review without shaping support promotion.
Bundled font catalog dump changes require deterministic-order review, duplicate/provenance diagnostic review, and explicit non-claims for any missing multi-script bundled rows.
Scan-root golden changes require explicit fixture paths, stable accepted-family order, and matrix checkpoint updates.
Telemetry schema dump changes require domain list, dimension policy, refusal diagnostic, and matrix checkpoint review without performance-gate promotion.
Telemetry fixture dump changes require repeated-run aggregation, GPU-dimension conditionality, refusal diagnostic, and matrix checkpoint review without budget or GPU-claim promotion.
Eviction-trace golden changes require reviewed generation/invalidation-token deltas, resident-byte diffs, and explicit non-claim review without GPU upload or dftext promotion.
Atlas golden changes require reviewed entry/source-hash/upload-byte diffs, generation-token review, and explicit non-claim review without GPU upload or dftext promotion.

Glyph cache inventory golden changes require reviewed key-preimage/hash diffs, resident-byte accounting review, lifecycle-state review, and explicit non-claim review without GPU ownership or dftext promotion.

Glyph cache telemetry golden changes require reviewed cold/warm sample deltas, advisory timing-counter diffs, budget-refusal review, and explicit confirmation that no blocking perf gate or GPU upload claim was introduced.
Strike-key golden changes require route-family, refusal, hash-preimage, and non-claim review before any artifact, atlas, or GPU route promotion.
GPOS trace golden changes require contract review and stable diagnostic review without GPOS lookup implementation or support promotion.
GSUB trace golden changes require contract review and stable diagnostic review without GSUB lookup implementation or support promotion.
Latin GSUB/GPOS golden changes require fixture provenance, feature-order and cluster review, and matrix checkpoint updates without broader script promotion.

targetSpec.section: Font sources, SFNT/OpenType parsing, and collections

dumpRows.updatePolicy: Malformed SFNT fixture-suite changes require deterministic byte hashes, one primary expected diagnostic per case, explicit linked evidence, and non-claim review.
Paragraph input golden changes require style-range, placeholder, diagnostic, and shaping/fallback blocker review without complete paragraph support promotion.
Paragraph dump changes require refusal tests and explicit shaping/fallback gates.
PNG dump changes require malformed payload refusals and stable pixel hash tests.
Resolved fallback run golden changes require cluster-range, selected typeface, fallback-reason, refusal diagnostic, and matrix checkpoint review without shaping or fallback support promotion.
Script run golden changes require fixture text diff review, pinned Unicode source review, stable diagnostic review, and explicit non-claims without GSUB/GPOS, paragraph, or GPU text promotion.
SDF dump changes require distance-range and sample-bound tests.

SDF artifact golden changes require reviewed spread/padding/hash diffs, normalization-edge checks, refusal-diagnostic review, and explicit non-claim review without atlas, GPU, LCD, or dftext promotion.
Format 14 readiness golden changes require required-table checks, diagnostic review, and explicit remaining-gate wording.
SFNT table fact dump changes require deterministic table-order tests, missing-required and malformed-optional diagnostics, and matrix checkpoint updates without parser payload or support promotion.
Shaped glyph run golden changes require cluster, glyph, diagnostic, and no-native-oracle review without support promotion.
Shaping plan golden changes require schema, required case coverage, and diagnostic review without feature, fallback, paragraph, or GPU text support promotion.
SVG dump changes require bounded parser and refusal tests.
TrueType composite glyph golden changes require point-matching, transform, recursion, invalid component, component-count, metrics, and non-claim review before any claim promotion.

TrueType gvar IUP golden changes require simple-contour explicit/inferred delta review, wraparound verification, contour-isolation coverage, avar normalization evidence, composite child evidence, phantom-point advance review, malformed tuple diagnostics, and non-claim review before any claim promotion.
Malformed glyf isolation golden changes require face-versus-glyph refusal review, safe-glyph positive-control review, stable diagnostic review, and explicit non-claims before any claim promotion.
TrueType variation readiness golden changes require variation fixture provenance, diagnostic review, and explicit remaining-gate wording before any variable-font support promotion.

TrueType vertical metric golden changes require vhea/vmtx parsing review, fallback diagnostic review, bounded VVAR advance-height review, malformed-table diagnostic review, and non-claim review before any claim promotion.
Unicode data manifest golden changes require input SHA-256 review, generated table hash diffs, and explicit non-claim review without replacing BasicUnicodeData.
Unicode seed dump changes require bounded source extract diffs, generated table hash review, and explicit non-claim review without Unicode conformance or shaping promotion.
Unicode version mismatch diagnostic changes require stable reason-code review and must not imply segmentation, bidi, shaping, or GPU text support.

Unicode segments golden changes require bounded Unicode source extract diff review, per-boundary rule review, deterministic diagnostics, and explicit non-claims without shaping, paragraph, or GPU text promotion.
